content: The Self-Refine iterative self-improvement framework can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a two-layer self-improvement system where intra-output iteration for refinement is complemented by inter-perspective inconsistency for deeper reflection. This hybrid system retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no extra training or labeled data while resolving its common limitation of getting stuck in local suboptimal feedback loops.
